MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-19-2015 IN 206, DEFENDANT THIAT LIANG'S MOTION TO REQUEST FOR POSTPONEMENT OF TRIAL IS GRANTED. TRIAL DATE OF 3/30/15 IS VACATED, AS ARE ANY PRETRIAL DISCOVERY DEADLINES CONSISTENT WITH THAT DATE. DISCOVERY IS REOPENED. THE COURT SETS THE CASE BACK TO A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 6/17/15 IN ORDER FOR DEFENDANT THIAT LIANG TO OBTAIN NEW COUNSEL, AS WELL AS TO GIVE DEFENDANT THIAT LIANG SUFFICIENT TIME TO TAKE CARE OF PERSONAL MATTERS THAT HE DISCLOSED TO THE COURT AT THE HEARING. THE COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL, DALE CHEN, TO PREPARE THE ORDER. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
